query:
SELECT p.code, p.module, p.action 
FROM rolePermissions rp 
JOIN permissions p ON rp.permissionId = p.id 
JOIN systemRoles sr ON rp.roleId = sr.id 
WHERE sr.code = 'admin' 
ORDER BY p.module, p.action;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user BsRQq1X2Mh9kZmK.6749932367bb --database WqXabcMRQ5aEFJ4QyeefuN --execute SELECT p.code, p.module, p.action 
FROM rolePermissions rp 
JOIN permissions p ON rp.permissionId = p.id 
JOIN systemRoles sr ON rp.roleId = sr.id 
WHERE sr.code = 'admin' 
ORDER BY p.module, p.action;
